x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Benefits realization data enables Now Assist SPM to validate AI portfolio investment recommendations with historical ROI evidence.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure benefits realization tracking on projects. Record actual benefits greater than zero after project completion. Target: 10+ closed projects with benefits data. Now Assist SPM uses this for AI ROI validation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Benefits realization data enables Now Assist SPM to validate AI portfolio investment recommendations with historical ROI evidence.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Benefits Realization Tracking</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // pm_project.state is INTEGER: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete
    // pm_project.state INTEGER: 3=Closed Complete, 4=Closed Incomplete, 7=Closed Skipped
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('pm_project');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4,7');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed projects found',
            finding: 'No closed projects found on this instance. Benefits realization tracking cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithBenefit = new GlideAggregate('pm_project');
    gaWithBenefit.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,4,7');
    gaWithBenefit.addQuery('actual_benefit', '>', 0);
    gaWithBenefit.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithBenefit.query();
    var withBenefit = gaWithBenefit.next() ? parseInt(gaWithBenefit.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = withBenefit + ' of ' + total + ' closed projects with benefits tracked';

    if (withBenefit >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: withBenefit + ' closed projects with benefits data. Now Assist SPM can validate AI portfolio recommendations with historical ROI.'
        };
    } else if (withBenefit >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + withBenefit + ' closed projects have benefits tracked (target: 10+). Now Assist SPM historical ROI validation will have limited data.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + withBenefit + ' closed projects have benefits data. Now Assist SPM validates AI portfolio recommendations with historical ROI — insufficient data limits AI accuracy.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>SPM</module>
<number>CHK0006100</number>
<order>90</order>
<remediation_guidance>Configure benefits realization tracking on projects. Record actual benefits greater than zero after project completion. Target: 10+ closed projects with benefits data. Now Assist SPM uses this for AI ROI validation.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>c203a33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
